description_long: This is a modern high-rise apartment building with approximately twelve stories, featuring a sleek, rectilinear design and a dark facade accented by light-colored balcony railings. The building is set on a landscaped base with small trees, shrubs, and paved walkways, and includes a driveway and parking area at the front. The structure has a flat roof, with rooftop amenities such as a terrace and greenery visible from some angles. Large, regularly spaced windows and balconies run along the length of the building, providing ample natural light and outdoor space for residents. The ground level includes a main entrance, likely with glass doors, and a secure perimeter wall. The overall appearance is contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on functionality and urban living.
description: A modern, multi-story apartment building with balconies, large windows, and landscaped surroundings. The design is sleek and contemporary, with a dark facade and light accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, landscaped area, driveway, and prominent balconies.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the building's length, parking area, and additional landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the building's flat roof, rooftop terrace, and regular window arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible balconies, secondary entrance, and more greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in a regular, vertical grid pattern, aligned symmetrically across each floor and paired with balconies for most units.
